description: Estimate three wage regression models using the 'cps5_small.gdt' dataset (~/Documents/gretl_data/cps5_small.gdt). Model 1 is an OLS regression of 'wage' on 'educ' and 'exper'. Model 2 is an OLS regression of 'wage' on 'educ', 'exper', and 'metro'. Model 3 is an OLS regression of 'wage' on 'educ', 'exper', 'metro', 'female', and 'black' using robust standard errors (HC1). Export a comparison table containing all three models to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/wage_models.tex in LaTeX format.
